displayDescription.zh: YOLO 把目标检测重新表述为单次回归问题。它不再先提候选区域再逐个分类，而是让一个网络从整张图一次性预测边界框和类别概率。这个思路让实时目标检测成为主流工程目标。
displayDescription.en: YOLO reframed object detection as a single regression problem. Instead of proposing regions and classifying them separately, one network predicted bounding boxes and class probabilities from the whole image in one pass. The result made real-time object detection a mainstream engineering target.

site.zh: 计算机视觉与模式识别会议 / arXiv

description.en: Canonical paper for single-shot real-time detection; local graphics redraw grid and box prediction.
description.zh: 单阶段实时检测的经典论文；本地图重画网格和框预测。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

html.zh: YOLO 之前，高精度检测器常依赖多阶段管线。YOLO 追问：如果检测变成一个稠密预测问题会怎样？
html.en: Before YOLO, high-accuracy detectors often relied on multi-stage pipelines. YOLO asked what would happen if detection became one dense prediction problem.

html.zh: 图像被划成网格；每个网格单元一次前向传播就预测框、置信度和类别。 关键机制是基于网格的单阶段目标检测，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。
html.en: The image is divided into a grid; each cell predicts boxes, confidence, and classes, all in one forward pass. The key mechanism is Single-shot grid-based object detection, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 YOLO 视为让实时目标检测成为核心基准目标的系统。它的长期影响在于把检测表述为快速的单次前向预测，并影响了许多后续检测器家族和部署预期。
html.en: Experts generally treat YOLO as the system that made real-time object detection a central benchmark goal. Its long-term legacy is the framing of detection as fast single-pass prediction, influencing many later detector families and deployment expectations.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
